sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  /* ================= PAGE ================= */

  pageWrapper:
    "min-h-screen bg-slate-50 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-10 py-6 sm:py-8",

  container:
    "max-w-7xl mx-auto",

  /* ================= TITLE & PATH ================= */

  headerWrapper:
    "flex flex-col gap-3 mb-6",

  title:
    "text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl font-semibold text-slate-800",

  subtitle:
    "text-sm sm:text-base text-slate-500",

  pathWrapper:
    "flex items-center gap-2 text-sm sm:text-base font-medium",

  pathActive:
    "text-slate-500",

  pathInactive:
    "text-blue-600 hover:underline cursor-pointer",

  /* ================= NAV BAR ================= */

  navWrapper:
    "flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4 mb-6",

  navRight:
    "flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center gap-3 w-full md:w-auto",

  /* ================= SEARCH ================= */

  searchInput:
    "w-full sm:w-64 h-11 sm:h-12 px-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white text-sm sm:text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-400 transition",

  /* ================= DROPDOWN (SORT / STATUS) ================= */

  select:
    "w-full sm:w-44 h-11 sm:h-12 px-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white text-sm sm:text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-400 transition appearance-none cursor-pointer",

  /* ================= BUTTON ================= */

  buttonDark:
    "w-full sm:w-auto h-11 sm:h-12 px-6 rounded-xl bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white text-sm sm:text-base font-medium transition shadow-sm",

  buttonCancel:
    "w-full sm:w-auto h-11 sm:h-12 px-6 rounded-xl bg-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-600 text-white text-sm sm:text-base font-medium transition",

  /* ================= CARD ================= */

  card:
    "bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm",

  formSection:
    "p-6 border-b border-slate-200 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4",

  /* ================= INPUT (IMPORTANT FIX) ================= */

  input:
    "w-full h-11 sm:h-12 px-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white text-sm sm:text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-400 transition",

  /* ================= TABLE ================= */

  tableWrapper:
    "divide-y divide-slate-200",

  tableHeader:
    "hidden md:grid grid-cols-4 px-6 py-4 text-xs sm:text-sm font-medium uppercase text-slate-500",

  tableRow:
    "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 items-center px-4 sm:px-6 py-4 text-sm sm:text-base hover:bg-slate-50 transition",

  linkName:
    "font-medium text-slate-800 text-sm sm:text-base",

  badgeActive:
    "inline-flex items-center justify-center h-9 sm:h-10 px-4 rounded-full text-sm sm:text-base font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700",

  badgeInactive:
    "inline-flex items-center justify-center h-9 sm:h-10 px-4 rounded-full text-sm sm:text-base font-medium bg-red-100 text-red-700",

  emptyState:
    "py-16 text-center text-slate-400 text-sm sm:text-base",
};
